mapper.select: SELECT * FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE user_id = 0 OR user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE user_id = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk (source, category, content, vector, date, user_id) VALUES (#{source}, #{category}, #{content}, #{vector}, #{date}, #{user_id})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE source = #{source} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM knowledge_chunk WHERE user_id = 0
